askAi.noEnabledServices: No AI services enabled. Enable services in Settings > Ask AI.

ocr.rapidNotInstalled: RapidOCR runtime is not installed yet
ocr.rapidUnsupported: RapidOCR runtime is not supported on this platform
ocr.rapidInstallRequired: This engine stays unavailable until the RapidOCR runtime is installed.
ocr.rapidSourcesPlaceholder: Optional manifest URLs, one per line
ocr.rapidSourcesHint: Use this to add mirror URLs or a private manifest endpoint when the default source is slow or blocked.
ocr.localModelHint: Local model requires manual installation. The program sends base64 image data via stdin and reads JSON results from stdout.
